codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully adds the required ripgrep ecosystem crates and exposes a `native_search` module wrapped behind `run_native_search()`. All requested output modes and configuration parameters are supported. The worker also added comprehensive tests that pass. A minor architectural issue (collecting files in parallel but searching sequentially) was introduced, but is acceptable at this scaffold stage and is addressed in a later feature.

issues.description: The worker used `WalkParallel` to discover files concurrently, but collected them into a `BTreeSet` and searched them sequentially, limiting performance for many-file queries. This is acceptable for the initial scaffold and is already identified for fixing in the subsequent `native-cpu-benchmarks` feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered that `ignore::WalkBuilder` requires explicit `add_ignore` calls for `.gitignore` files to be respected when testing with temporary directories outside the main repository root. The worker proactively documented this in `.factory/library/native-cpu-engine.md`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit diff shows additions to `.factory/library/native-cpu-engine.md` noting the explicit `add_ignore` calls needed for `ignore::WalkBuilder`.

summary: Review passed. The worker properly embedded the grep ecosystem crates, implemented all requested native search capabilities (JSON/NDJSON/count, binary detection), and added a robust test suite covering all cases.
